title: Visualizing Weak-Driven Learning: An Interactive WMSS Demo
excerpt: Interactive walkthrough of the WMSS paper — from SFT saturation to logit mixing and gradient amplification. Play with lambda sliders, watch training curves, and understand how weak agents make strong agents stronger.

title: How 468 Facial Landmarks Decide If You're Passport-Ready
excerpt: MediaPipe face mesh, rembg segmentation, 25+ compliance checks, and country-specific rules for 6 countries. Here's how Photo ID Studio decides if your face is passport-worthy.

title: How I Built an AI-Powered Stock Market Dashboard
excerpt: A deep dive into Trader Koo – from using a pre-trained YOLOv8 model to detect chart patterns, to solving the coordinate mapping problem, to running a five-layer detection ensemble every night.

title: I Tried to Predict Singapore's Rain and It Humbled Me
excerpt: Building LionWeather: 8 years of NEA data, LightGBM rainfall prediction, SHAP explainability, animated radar, and a whole lot of lessons about tropical weather.
